items.title: When the Trump administration cracks down on Anthropic, who benefits?
items.summary: On the new episode of Equity, we discussed what actually prompted the administration's latest moves against Anthropic, and what this might mean for the AI ecosystem.
items.titleZh: 当特朗普政府打击Anthropic时，谁会受益？
items.summaryZh: 在《公平》的新一期中，我们讨论了是什么促使政府对Anthropic采取了最新行动，以及这对人工智能生态系统意味着什么。

items.title: Tesla plans to sell modular AI data center hardware called ‘Megapod’
items.summary:
Tesla wants to sell modular AI data center hardware, according to a new trademark application for a product called “Megapod.”
The filing describes a complete, self-contained computing system for AI workloads — and it lands less than a year after Tesla killed …
items.titleZh: 特斯拉计划出售名为“Megapod”的模块化AI数据中心硬件
items.summaryZh: 根据名为“Megapod”的产品的新商标申请，特斯拉希望销售模块化人工智能数据中心硬件

items.title: No one wants AI data centers on Earth. Do they make sense in space?
items.summary: Elon Musk's SpaceX is betting big on orbital AI data centers. The public doesn't want them on Earth, but the economic case for space-based is questionable.
items.titleZh: 没有人希望在地球上建立人工智能数据中心。它们在太空中有意义吗？
items.summaryZh: 埃隆·马斯克的太空探索技术公司正大力投资轨道人工智能数据中心。公众不希望它们出现在地球上，但太空的经济可行性值得怀疑。

items.title: AI 'Amplification Spiral' May Be Causing Delusions Among Users, Study Suggests
items.summary: New research outlines how chatbot behaviors, including personalization, mirroring, and excessive agreement, reinforce delusions.
items.titleZh: 研究表明，人工智能的“放大螺旋”可能会导致用户产生错觉
items.summaryZh: 新的研究概述了聊天机器人的行为，包括个性化、镜像和过度同意，是如何强化妄想的。

items.title: All Of The Music That’s Been Fed Into ‘Generative’ (Read: Theft-Based) AI
items.summary: “Companies often claim to use only content that is freely available online, but the datasets reveal the quantity of downloadable music that developers can access even though it is not supposed to be free.” – The Atlantic
items.titleZh: 所有被输入“生成”（阅读：基于盗窃）人工智能的音乐
items.summaryZh: “公司经常声称只使用在线免费提供的内容，但数据集揭示了开发人员可以访问的可下载音乐的数量，即使它不应该是免费的。”-《大西洋月刊》

items.title: Sam Altman thinks AI will surpass human intelligence by 2030. His rival AI billionaires say it’ll be even sooner
items.summary: The OpenAI CEO said GPT-5 is already smarter than he is.
items.titleZh: Sam Altman认为，到2030年，人工智能将超越人类智能。他的竞争对手人工智能亿万富翁表示，这将更快
items.summaryZh: OpenAI首席执行官表示，GPT-5已经比他聪明了。

items.title: What the Iran war cost the Pentagon, the economy — and Trump
items.summary: With an agreement signed, the US war with Iran is at a halt, at least for now, and President Donald Trump is telling Americans they have won.
items.titleZh: 伊朗战争给五角大楼、经济和特朗普带来了什么损失
items.summaryZh: 随着协议的签署，美国与伊朗的战争停止了，至少目前是这样，唐纳德·特朗普总统告诉美国人他们赢了。

items.title: New York City has defeated Waymo, and the taxi lobby is the reason
items.summary: Waymo delivers more than 500,000 paid rides per week across 10 US cities, raised $16 billion in February, and is expanding internationally to Tokyo and London. It cannot operate in New York City. The reason is not technical, it is political. As the New York T…
items.titleZh: 纽约市击败了Waymo，出租车大厅是原因
items.summaryZh: Waymo每周在美国10个城市提供超过50万次付费乘车服务，2月份筹集了160亿美元，并正在向东京和伦敦进行国际扩张。它不能在纽约市运营。原因不是技术性的，而是政治性的。纽约T…

items.title: I've studied deepfakes for more than 25 years. Here's why AI is making it nearly impossible for you to know what's real.
items.summary: Hany Farid, a digital forensics expert, said ordinary people can no longer reliably discern between real content and AI-generated content.
items.titleZh: 我研究deepfakes已经超过25年了。这就是为什么人工智能让你几乎不可能知道什么是真实的。
items.summaryZh: 数字取证专家Hany Farid表示，普通人再也无法可靠地区分真实内容和人工智能生成的内容。

items.title: Rivian is betting its future on the R2. Here's the clearest launch road map for the new electric SUV.
items.summary: Punchy electric startup Rivian  just launched the R2, its most important car. We reviewed customer communications to sketch out the wider rollout.
items.titleZh: Rivian将其未来押注于R2。这是新款电动SUV最清晰的发布路线图。
items.summaryZh: Punchy电动初创公司Rivian刚刚推出了其最重要的汽车R2。我们审查了客户沟通，以勾勒出更广泛的推广。
